page_metadata.biotools__summary: This is an interactive viewer for 2D embeddings such as UMAP or tSNE of high dimensional single-cell RNA-seq data that is run directly out of the Jupyter Notebook environment.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This is an interactive viewer for 2D embeddings such as UMAP or tSNE of high dimensional single-cell RNA-seq data that is run directly out of the Jupyter Notebook environment.
